commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Because you have let go out of your hand a man whom I appointed to utter destruction, therefore your life shall go for his life, and your people for his people. Hebrew, "of my anathema "or, "the man who has fallen into my snares. "(Vatable) Cherem is taken in this sense, Micheas vii. He was my prey, and you ought not to have disposed of him without my leave. (Calmet) People. This was verified (chap. ; Menochius) within three years.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
